name: Asana
description: Interact with Asana. This official Asana MCP integration is installable through Cline.

install.notes: Transport from source catalog: Streamable HTTP. Auth from source catalog: OAuth with Asana account; client ID/secret may be needed for some clients. Official Asana developer docs; beta SSE endpoint https://mcp.asana.com/sse is deprecated/shutting down 2026-05-11.
